TECHNICAL COLLEOE Technical fields such as computer and vehicle repair are taught in small colleges across the Inner Sphere. Civilian pilot schools also fall under this category: Entry requirements are fair- ly lenient; and tuition affordable or paid for by the government: Because this path covers So many possible careers_ the player chooses his or her character'$ specific course (field) and relevant subskills, subject to the gamemaster' approval: Tlme: years Attrlbute Minimums: DEX 3, INT 3 Skills: Academic / Any Relevant +3, Computers +2 Fields: Choose one: Civilian Tech DropShip Pilot or Civilian Aircraft Pilot Next Path: Ne'er-Do-Well (4), Civilian Job (4), Vehicle Technician Training Subpath (3, Civilian Tech Field only; part of this pass), JumpShip Pilot Training Subpath (3 DropShip Pilot Field only; part of this pass), Free Trader (4_ DropShip Pilot Field only)
Mandatory Subpath: Advanced Individual Training (AIT) Basic Training graduates only Tlme: years Tralts: Promotion Skllls: Tactics/Any +2, +1 t0 any three relevant skills any one field skii Flelds: Choose one of the following fields subject the listed restrictions: MechWarrior (minimum DEX 4, RFL 4) Aerospace Pilot (minimum DEX 4, RFL 4) Armored Infantry (minimum STR 6, BOD 5) Events: Do not roll events for Advanced Individual Training Next Path: Tour of Duty or DEST Training Subpath (3, part of this pass take if character enters the MechWarrior Or Armored Infantry fields)

Subpath: DEST Tralning AIT graduates (MechWarriors and Armored Intantry only) With the possible exception House Liao' Death Commandos the Draconis Elite Strike Teams are the most feared and efficient special forces in the Inner Sphere_ Candidates are sent to the DEST Tactical Command Center on Pesht for intense training   ad indoctrination; isolated from the outside world_ Teams of five soldiers train together ad graduate together to Form new strike team; these years of working together give Irem unsurpassed efficiency: Tlme: years
